Our Story

MORE THAN
JUST FOOD.

The Home Restaurant & Lounge was built on a simple truth — that great food hits different when you feel at home. We're tucked right in the heart of Calabar, and we've been welcoming families, friends, and late-night regulars with the same warmth since day one.

Our kitchen never sleeps. Neither does our hospitality. Whether you're here for a quick plate or a long lounge evening by the fireplace — we're always ready for you.

All You Can Eat
Fireplace Lounge
Open 24 Hours

OUR
MENU

₦2,000–4,000 per person. WhatsApp for daily specials & full menu.

01
Nigerian Classics
Ofe Onugbu & Fufu
Slow-cooked bitter leaf soup with assorted meats. Served with pounded yam, fufu, or eba.
₦2,000
02
Grills
Peppered Assorted Meat
Goat, cow, liver — grilled and peppered with suya spice and fresh tomatoes.
₦2,500
03
Rice & Mains
Smoky Party Jollof
Signature smoky jollof with fried chicken and coleslaw. Our most-ordered dish.
₦2,000
04
Seafood
Catfish Pepper Soup
Fresh point-and-kill pepper soup, Cross River style — aromatic and deeply warming.
₦2,500
05
Lounge Bites
Small Chops Platter
Puff puff, spring rolls, samosa, chicken skewers. The perfect happy hour companion.
₦1,500
06
★ Best Value
All You Can Eat Buffet
Unlimited mains, proteins, sides — best deal in Calabar, no question.

THE
EXPERIENCE

Every visit is personal. Every meal is memorable. Here's why guests keep coming back to The Home.

All You Can Eat
Unlimited Nigerian food at one great price. Come hungry. Leave with no regrets whatsoever.
Happy Hour
Discounted drinks and bites. Great food, better prices, even better company every evening.
Fireplace Lounge
Settle in by the fire. Slow down. Let the warmth hold the evening as long as you need.
Open 24 Hours
Your hunger doesn't keep office hours. Neither do we. Always warm, always ready for you.
